title: JavaScript Multimedia Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of HTMLMediaElement properties, methods, and events in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following describes the purpose of the currentTime property?
options: It returns the current date and time.
It sets or returns the current playback position in seconds.
It returns the total duration of the media file.
It displays the current time on the page.

questions.question: Which method should you use to start playback of an audio or video element?
What is the return type of the duration property?
Which event triggers periodically as the playback position of a media file changes?
Can you use JavaScript to set the volume of an HTML5 video element (volume range: 0.0 to 1.0)?
options: Yes, but you must use jQuery.
